def positive_comment_required_to_explain_opaque_branching_that_code_could_express():
    rule_id = "comment_required_to_explain_opaque_branching_that_code_could_express"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag code whose control flow stays unclear even with comments because the structure itself is weak."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
